title: Minimum Operations to Reduce X to Zero
titleCn: 将 x 减到 0 的最小操作数

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,4,2,3], x = 5 Output: 2 Explanation: The optimal solution is to remove the last two elements to reduce x to zero.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The optimal solution is to remove the last two elements to reduce x to zero.

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,20,1,1,3], x = 10 Output: 5 Explanation: The optimal solution is to remove the last three elements and the first two elements (5 operations in total) to reduce x to zero.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The optimal solution is to remove the last three elements and the first two elements (5 operations in total) to reduce x to zero.
